15.label: Creation of man and fall of Iblis

21.label: Creation of the heavens and earth
Moses and Aaron given the criterion
The heavens rolled like a scroll

23.label: The Horn blown, no ties remain

25.label: The Criterion sent to all worlds
Why no angels sent to us?

27.label: Praise Allah, peace on His chosen

28.label: Moses at the well in Madyan
You were not there when We revealed
You do not guide whom you like

29.label: Do people think they won't be tested?
Noah — a thousand years minus fifty

30.label: Corruption appears on land and sea
From weakness to strength to weakness

31.label: The wise Book — guidance for the good
The mustard seed — Allah sees all
Allah made all things subject to you
Knowledge of the Hour belongs to Allah

32.label: Believer and sinner are not equal
We also gave Moses the Scripture

33.label: O Prophet, say to your wives
Muslim men and women are equal

34.label: Praise to Allah — all belongs to Him
Invoke those besides Allah — they own nothing
Sent as messenger to all mankind
We will never believe in this Quran
When Our verses are recited they mock
When they are terrified — no escape

35.label: Creator of heavens, earth, and angels
He sends winds, revives dead earth
He made you successors on earth

36.label: By the wise Quran — you are a messenger
People of the city — three messengers
Dead earth revived — signs of creation
Turn back — perhaps you will receive mercy
Not befitting to teach him poetry

37.label: By those lined up in rows
Is your creation harder than the heavens?
Has your Lord daughters, you sons?

38.label: By the Quran — they are in pride
David — the two men who climbed
Job — Satan touched me with harm
Abraham, Isaac, Jacob — men of vision
I am only a warner — no god but Allah

39.label: The devout and the heedless — not equal
He who deserves punishment — can he be saved?
Is not Allah sufficient for His servant?
Whoever is guided — it is for his soul
Do not despair of Allah's mercy
They did not appraise Allah truly

40.label: Moses sent to Pharaoh and Haman
The believing man of Pharaoh's family
We support Our messengers and believers
Those who dispute the signs of Allah

41.label: Did you disbelieve in the Creator?
Do not listen to the Quran — make noise
Those who said our Lord is Allah
The Hour known only to Him

42.label: Revealed to you and those before
All dispute — ruling belongs to Allah
Allah subtle — gives to whom He wills
If provision extended — tyranny would spread
Disaster is for what your hands earned
What you have is temporary — Allah's is better

43.label: By the clear Book in Arabic
Ask the messengers sent before you
Moses sent to Pharaoh with signs
Close friends become enemies that Day
We are devising — do they think We hear not?

44.label: Sent down on a blessed night
Watch for the Day of visible smoke
Pharaoh's people and the noble messenger
There is only our first death
The tree of zaqqum — food for sinners
The righteous in security and gardens

45.label: Allah subjected the sea to you
Do evildoers think they equal believers?
The Day the falsifiers will lose

46.label: We did not create this in vain
When Our verses are recited they say — magic
Those who said our Lord is Allah
The son who mocks his parents
We established them then destroyed them
Allah able to raise the dead

47.label: If you support Allah He supports you
Gardens for believers, Fire for disbelievers
Among them those who listen then forget
Those who believe ask — why no chapter?
Those who oppose will have deeds wasted

48.label: A clear conquest given to you
Sent as witness and bringer of glad tidings
Allah pleased at the pledge under the tree
If they had fought you they would have fled

49.label: Do not put yourself before Allah
Verify what the disobedient brings you
Do not mock or defame each other
Created from one male and female

50.label: Signs in the sky and the earth
We created heavens and earth in six days
The Horn blown — the final gathering

51.label: The righteous in gardens and springs
Guests of Abraham — Lot's people warned

52.label: By the mount and the inscribed Book
The Day the heaven will sway
The righteous in gardens and pleasure
We were fearful among our people
You are not a soothsayer or madman
Be patient for your Lord's decision

53.label: By the star — he does not speak from desire
He who turned away and withheld
He creates, He causes death and life
Prostrate to Allah and worship Him

55.label: Man from clay, jinn from fire
O company of jinn and men
Two gardens for those who feared

56.label: We created you — why not believe?
I swear by the setting of stars
When the soul reaches the throat

57.label: Has the time not come for hearts?
Those who believe in the messengers
Fear Allah, believe in His messenger

58.label: Allah heard the woman who argued
Those who oppose Allah are abased
Those who ally with Allah's enemies
Their wealth will not avail them

59.label: The expelled People of the Book
What Allah restored to the messenger
Like those who tasted ruin before
He is Allah — no deity but Him

60.label: Do not take My enemies as allies
If they overpower you they will harm you
Perhaps Allah will put affection between you
Allah forbids not those who did not fight you
If wives flee to disbelievers — compensate
Do not ally with those Allah is angry with

61.label: Why say what you do not do?
Allah loves those who fight in rows
Moses — why do you harm me?
They want to extinguish Allah's light
Shall I guide you to a saving trade?

62.label: Wish for death if you are truthful
They will never wish for it
When Friday prayer is called — hasten

63.label: Do not spend on the messenger's companions
Do not let wealth distract from Allah

64.label: Believe in Allah and His messenger
The Day of Gathering — the Day of Loss
No disaster except by Allah's permission
Among your wives and children are enemies
Fear Allah as much as you are able

65.label: Divorce at the start of waiting period
When they fulfill their term — retain or part
House them and do not harm them
Fear Allah — He sent a messenger
Allah's command governs the seven heavens

66.label: Why forbid what Allah made lawful?
The Prophet confided to a wife

67.label: Dominion and the test of deeds
Hell — did no warner come to you?
Do you feel safe from Allah's punishment?
He gave you hearing, sight, and hearts
Say — have you considered your water?

68.label: By the pen — you are not mad
You will see — which of you is afflicted
Do not obey the arrogant slanderer
Such is the punishment of this world
Will We treat Muslims like criminals?
Leave Me with those who deny

69.label: Noah's people — carried in the ship
Record in right hand or behind back
Seize him, shackle him, burn him
No devoted friend — no food but wounds
I swear by what you see and do not see

70.label: The Day — a man flees his brother
Hell — invites those who turned away
We created them — I swear by the Lord
Leave them until they meet their Day

71.label: Noah sent to warn his people
I called them night and day
Why do you not honor Allah?
Allah made earth an expanse for you
They followed those who increased them in loss
Leave not one disbeliever on earth

72.label: Jinn heard the Quran and believed
Allah has no partner or son
We sought the heaven — found it guarded
If they stay straight — abundant water
Until they see what they were promised

73.label: We will cast a heavy word on you
Be patient — leave Me with the deniers
Shackles and burning fire await them
The Day earth convulses like mountains
Your Lord knows you stand in prayer

74.label: The Day the trumpet is blown
Leave Me with the one I created alone
I will drive him into Saqar
By the moon — the warning is real
Every soul retained for what it earned
What is wrong — why do they turn away?
It is only a reminder for those who will

75.label: I swear by the Day of Resurrection
Does man think bones will not be gathered?
When sight is dazzled — the moon darkens
No refuge — to your Lord that Day
When the soul reaches the collar bones
Was he not once a sperm drop?

76.label: Man created from a mixed drop
The righteous drink from Kafur springs
Be patient — do not obey sinners
We created them — We can change them

77.label: By the winds sent in gusts
Woe that Day to the deniers
Did We not destroy former peoples?
Did We not create you from fluid?
Have We not made earth a container?
Proceed to the shadow of smoke
This is a Day they will not speak
The righteous in shade and springs
If you do not bow — woe to the deniers

78.label: Gardens and pleasure for the righteous
Lord of heavens — they cannot speak
The day the wrongdoer will say — I wish

79.label: By the angels who extract souls
Moses warns — a lesson for those who fear
Is your creation harder than the heaven?
The Day man remembers what he strove for
They ask about the Hour — when?

80.label: The Prophet frowned at the blind man
Man has not done what He commanded
Let man look at his food

81.label: A soul will know what it brought
The Quran — word of a noble messenger
A reminder for those who will

82.label: A soul confronts what it sent forward
The righteous in pleasure — wicked in fire
The Day of Recompense — who owns it?

83.label: Woe to those who give short measure
Record of the wicked in Sijjeen
Woe to the deniers of Judgment Day
This is what you used to deny
Record of the righteous in Illiyyun

84.label: O mankind — laboring toward your Lord
Record in right hand — easy account
Record behind back — crying for destruction
He thought he would never return to Allah

87.label: Exalt the name of your Lord Most High
We will make you recite — you will not forget
In the scriptures of Abraham and Moses

88.label: Has the report of the Overwhelming reached you?
Do they not look at the camel and sky?
He who turns away — greatest punishment
To Us is their return and reckoning

89.label: By the dawn and ten nights
Is there not an oath for one of perception?
How your Lord dealt with Aad and Thamud
Man thinks honor and trial are the same
You do not honor the orphan
When earth is leveled — your Lord comes
O reassured soul — return to your Lord

90.label: He thinks none can overpower him
Have We not given him two eyes?
He has not attempted the difficult pass
Freeing a slave or feeding the hungry
Companions of the right and left

91.label: By the sun and the moon
By the sky and the earth
By the soul and its fashioning
The soul inspired with right and wrong
He who purifies the soul succeeds
He does not fear the consequence

92.label: By the night and the day
He who gives and fears Allah
He who withholds and feels self-sufficient
What will his wealth avail when he falls?

93.label: Your Lord has not forsaken you
He found you orphaned and guided you
He found you poor and enriched you
Proclaim the favor of your Lord

94.label: Did We not expand your breast?
We removed your burden from you
Direct your longing to your Lord

95.label: By the fig, olive, and Sinai
Man created in the best stature
Then returned to the lowest of the low
Except those who believe and do good
Is Allah not the most just of judges?

96.label: He who forbids a servant from prayer
If he does not desist — We will drag him
Do not obey — prostrate and draw near

97.label: We sent it down on the Night of Decree
What can make you know this night?
Angels descend by their Lord's permission
Peace until the emergence of dawn

98.label: Disbelievers would not desist until proof came
People of the Book divided after proof
Believers who do good — best of creatures

99.label: Man says — what is wrong with it?
Atom's weight of good or evil seen

100.label: Man is ungrateful to his Lord
Their Lord fully acquainted that Day

102.label: Competition diverts you to the graves
No — you are going to know
If only you knew with certainty

103.label: Except those who believe and advise

104.label: Woe to every slanderer and mocker
Wealth counted — he thinks it makes him immortal
The fire of Allah mounted at hearts

105.label: Have you not seen the elephant army?

106.label: The covenant of the two journeys
Worship the Lord of this House
Who fed them and gave them security

108.label: Pray and sacrifice to Him alone
Your enemy is the one cut off

109.label: I do not worship what you worship
Nor will you worship what I worship
Your way and mine are separate

111.label: Abu Lahab — wealth will not avail him
He will burn in a flaming fire

112.label: He is Allah — One, the Eternal Refuge
He neither begets nor was begotten

113.label: Seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak
Refuge from the evil of darkness
From envy and those who blow on knots

114.label: Lord, King, and God of mankind
Who whispers in the hearts of mankind
